title: The Fleet Takes Shape — Closing Beat
description: The grateful allied captains gather around Luffy and prepare to follow him.
scene: On pages 12–15, Luffy, Bartolomeo, Sai, Colosseum Fighters, Straw Hat Pirates gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All the rubble from throughout the country... has been gathered in the sky above the eastern port!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: This is all clearly Admiral Fujitora's doing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It was quite tiresome seeing all of this littered everywhere,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So I thought I'd just make some use of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This wreckage left behind from the battle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: of those most annoying pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Bastille.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: BAS- Tille!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: O-TSURU- San! What is it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Still need those rein- forecasts?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: All Marine Squads! This is an order!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What in the world are we even looking at!? the doings of a god!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Personal, withdraw from the Eastern Port!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A new species of bird !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: EVacuate to a safe location immediately:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Do not get in Admiral IsShou's way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Sawhere doesn't

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Does he intend to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Take out the pirates with that abomination !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Oh my... who is going to save them from that !?

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Straw Hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Don't tell me the escape operation's gonna go up in flames...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: WhaaaaA AAAAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: This isn't the time for us to be standing around with our mouths open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: We must come to the usolanders' aid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Oi! Why is it that whenever I see you guys, you're sitting around with your thumbs up your ass! Get ready to set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: We were waiting for you two, damn it! Where the hell have you been, Trafal-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: GAR LAW!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Everyone, hurry to the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: There He is!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: WhoAA! Luffy- Senpai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Hurry hurry! Just make a beeline for the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Just maneuver around the geezer FUJI- Tora Guy Like "FWISH" and...

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Everyone, hurry! To the ship! Straw Hat and law are both here!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: We're all here! Run for it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: OI! Mr. Gambler!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Re- Member Me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: So you've finally come, Straw Hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Here's a faceful of tropical punch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Hehhhhhh!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: We can't keep just saying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: "Oh, we'll beat them someday."

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: So what if he's an Admiral !?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Why do we have to run !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I swore I'd leave that habit behind two years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: What-

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Marine Admirals,

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: YONKOU, Admirals,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: I DON'T GIVE A DAMN WHO! I'M GONNA BLAST 'EM ALL AWAY!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 'Cause that's what a true pirate King would do!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Is this the resolve for a battle against an Admiral?

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
